---

Define your target audience and brand strategy
Create list of brands and influencers and follow them
Decide on monetization strategy (website, messaging, etc)
Research trends by actively using Instagram
OVERALL STRATEGY:
Monitor and reply to comments on your posts
Create continual posts, Reels, stories and lives
Check your activity updates (notifications)
Check direct message inbox and reply as needed
Like and comment on top followers and influencers posts
Like and comment on relevant hashtag posts
Check on promoted posts in Facebook Ad Manager (optional)
DAILY ACTIVITY:
Update your bio and link whenever needed
Add or update Story Highlights menu on profile
Collaborate with influencers/other brands
Analyze content that resonates with audience
Pull reports from Insights tab or a 3rd party tool
Consider shoutouts, giveaways, hashtag contests, etc
WEEKLY/MONTHLY ACTIVITY:
Keep going… consistency is the key!
